steps.title: Use only the endpoints of the interval
steps.content: Average rate of change from $x=0$ to $x=5$ only depends on the graph values at those two endpoints. From the graph, the rainfall starts at $(0,0)$ and is at $(5,3)$ when $x=5$.

steps.title: Compute the average rate of change
steps.content: Use change in rainfall divided by change in time: $$\frac{y(5)-y(0)}{5-0}=\frac{3-0}{5}=\frac{3}{5}=0.6.$$ The units are centimeters per hour.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The answer is 0.6. Equivalent accepted forms include 0.6 and 3/5.
